content_body: Our vacation was phenomenal! Sanctuary was everything we had hoped for and more. The view was breathtaking; the hot tub was fantastic. The cabin had everything anyone could ever want or need. It was clean and comfortable. We absolutely love this place! We came up to ride our motorcycle through the mountains, and that's exactly what we did. The riding was some of the best in the country, and the barbecue restaurants were exceptional. We will be back again soon, and we will be staying in the Sanctuary again. Thank you Cabin Rentals Of Georgia for everything. We love you!
title: Phenomenal!
